mapper.select: SELECT ap.app_policy_id appPolicyId, ap.line_id lineId, a.application_id appId, a.application_name appName, ap.is_active isActive, ap.data_limit dailyLimitData, ap.speed_limit dailyLimitSpeed, ap.is_whitelist isActiveWhiteList FROM APPLICATION a LEFT JOIN APP_POLICY ap ON ap.application_id = a.application_id AND ap.line_id = #{lineId} AND ap.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE a.application_id = #{appId};
mapper.sql:
FROM APPLICATION a LEFT JOIN APP_POLICY ap ON ap.application_id = a.application_id AND ap.line_id = #{lineId} AND ap.deleted_at IS NULL
AND a.application_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( ap.app_policy_id IS NOT NULL AND ap.is_active = 1 AND ap.is_whitelist = 0 AND (ap.data_limit != -1 OR ap.speed_limit != -1) )
AND ( ap.app_policy_id IS NULL OR ap.is_active = 0 OR (ap.is_active = 1 AND ap.data_limit = -1 AND ap.speed_limit = -1) )
AND ( ap.app_policy_id IS NOT NULL AND ap.is_active = 1 AND ap.is_whitelist = 1 )
AND ( ap.app_policy_id IS NOT NULL AND ap.is_active = 1 AND ap.data_limit != -1 )
AND ( ap.app_policy_id IS NOT NULL AND ap.is_active = 1 AND ap.speed_limit != -1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT ap.app_policy_id AS appPolicyId, ap.line_id AS lineId, a.application_id AS appId, a.application_name AS appName, ap.is_active AS isActive, ap.data_limit AS dailyLimitData, ap.speed_limit AS dailyLimitSpeed, ap.is_whitelist AS isActiveWhiteList
ORDER BY a.application_name DESC, a.application_id DESC
ORDER BY ap.is_active DESC, ap.app_policy_id DESC, a.application_id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT app_policy_id, line_id, application_id, data_limit, speed_limit, is_active, created_at, deleted_at, updated_at, is_whitelist FROM APP_POLICY WHERE app_policy_id = #{appPolicyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL;

SELECT ap.app_policy_id appPolicyId, ap.line_id lineId, a.application_id appId, a.application_name appName, ap.is_active isActive, ap.data_limit dailyLimitData, ap.speed_limit dailyLimitSpeed, ap.is_whitelist isActiveWhiteList FROM APP_POLICY ap JOIN APPLICATION a ON a.application_id = ap.application_id WHERE ap.app_policy_id = #{appPolicyId} AND ap.deleted_at IS NULL;
